data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'send-time optimization (send when customer usually opens)', but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this feature is implemented or functioning. The linked use case outlines the need for send-time optimization, but without any supporting evidence or checks to confirm its coverage, the requirement is deemed unmet. This results in a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence for send-time optimization functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
